name: mega-frontend
description: Distinctive frontend design direction, typography, layout, and UX copy.

interface.shortDescription: Frontend design guidance that avoids templated defaults.
interface.longDescription: A skill for deliberate visual design when building or reshaping UI: grounding direction in the subject, a token-system planning pass, typography and structure principles, a dated calibration of current AI-default looks, and UX copy guidance.
defaultPrompt: Use mega-frontend to set the design direction for this page.
Use mega-frontend to make this UI stop looking templated.
